name: EQT Corp
summary: PARTI General We are a vertically integrated natural gas company with upstream, gathering and transmission operations focused in the Appalachian Basin. As of December31, 2025, we had 28.0 Tcfe of proved natural gas, NGLs and oil reserves across approximately 2.3 million gross acres and approximately 2,945 miles of pipeline infrastructure. In addition, we own an investment in Series A of Mountain Valley Pipeline, LLC (MVP A), which owns the Mountain Valley Pipeline (MVP Mainline), a 303-mile-long...
